text: Magnetic field wave - attacks entities with a beam attack.
Negative magnet - spawn blue magnet which repels entities.
Positive magnet - spawn red magnet which attracts entities.
$(o)Condition:$() Copper or iron blocks within 16 blocks.
Pole Resistance: +20% damage; 20% chance to repel target on attack.
Magnetic Field: Automatically attracts items within 16 blocks.
